regime_fall.current_status: Following intensive US military campaigns that destroyed Iran's air defenses and defense industrial base, a fragile ceasefire negotiated in early April 2026 has unraveled as Israeli strikes resumed in mid-June, assassinating senior IRGC leaders and targeting regime institutions. Post-ceasefire period marked by regime crackdowns, over 700 arrests, and fatal shootings as the regime consolidates control amid military losses and economic crisis.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Post-ceasefire repression surge including over 700 arrests, IRGC/Basij raids across Iranian cities, and fatal shootings in Khomein and Hamedan on July 2, 2026, indicating regime attempting to consolidate control through internal security operations.
